_comment: Auto-update checks YOUR fork (Sigmachan/STLT). It is downgrade-proof: it only updates when a GitHub RELEASE exists whose version is strictly newer than the running build, AND that release has an attached asset named to match asset_name below. Because you run ahead of your releases, it will normally report up-to-date and do nothing. To publish an update: cut a GitHub release with a tag >= the version, and attach the plugin zip named 'STLT.zip'. To disable updates entirely, blank owner/repo.
